hero.body: We are the reference energy partner for businesses across the Canary Islands. We don't sell panels: we design structural savings, operational security and real autonomy, with the judgement of those who know the territory.

narrative.leadAccent: The kind that belongs to all.

chapters.title: We believe in free energy.
chapters.text: The kind nature and our surroundings provide. Our work is to transform it and bring it to those it belongs to: every home and every business in the Canary Islands.

chapters.title: We know the terrain.
chapters.text: We were founded in 2000 to support the energy transition from within, with technical rigour and a local sensitivity no national operator can replicate.

chapters.title: Solidity and proximity.
chapters.text: We compete between the large operators who don't know the islands and the small installers without structure. We fill the space in between that neither covers.

narrative.pull: We don't just install. We accompany.

pillars.body: Four commitments that define how we work with every company that trusts us.

items.title: Local knowledge
items.body: We understand the regulatory framework, the climate, island logistics and the subsidies specific to the Canary Islands. We know the islands and we know your business.

items.title: Start to finish
items.body: From the energy study to subsidy applications, from installation to maintenance. Transparency and continuous communication at every stage.

items.title: B2B specialisation
items.body: We work with hotels, industry, retail and agribusiness. We talk about ROI, efficiency and operational continuity, not empty promises.

items.title: Technical authority
items.body: We only work with equipment and solutions proven reliable in the Canary Islands' energy and climate context.

leadership.quote: Moving towards energy that is more our own is not just a professional goal: it is a way to strengthen the resilience of the archipelago.
leadership.name: Carla Isarí Díaz Ortega
leadership.body: With over two decades in the Canary Islands' energy sector, Carla has led some of the most ambitious transition projects in the islands. Her vision combines technical rigour with a deep respect for the territory and its communities.

testimonial.quote: The team didn't just install our renewable system: they supported us from day one and solved a real operational continuity problem.
testimonial.name: Roberto Martínez

cta.titleLead: Energy for your business, with the confidence of
cta.body: Request your free savings study. We analyse your consumption and show you the real potential of your installation, with no commitment.
